nodes.name: Download via yt-dlp service
nodes.notes: Docker app giv-ytdlp on giv-ytdlp-net (internal only). No token — see apps/giv-ytdlp README.

options.systemMessage: You are a medical website content assistant for Prof. Giv Sharifi, a neurosurgeon in Dubai and Tehran. Output valid JSON only via the parser. All public text must be professional English suitable for SEO.

nodes.name: Get video-library.json
nodes.notes: GitHub Contents API — returns base64 content + sha for edit.

parameters.commitMessage: content: add video via Telegram bot

parameters.content:
## Video publish (Instagram + YouTube)
HTTP → `giv-ytdlp` Docker app (download + R2 upload) → Gemini → GitHub.

Service: `http://giv-ytdlp:9876` | Bucket: `givsharifi-videos` | Site: https://www.givsharifi.com
n8n env: not required (service is internal Docker network only).
